title: New Grant Expands Job Development Opportunities for Bering Strait Region from Middle School to Adults
summary: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE August 27, 2021 Contact: Danielle Slingsby, Kawerak Inc. Outreach dslingsby@kawerak.org, (907) 434-0518 New Grant Expands Job Development Opportunities for Bering Strait Region from Middle School to Adults Kawerak Inc. was recently awarded a 5 year Native American Career and Technical Education Program (NACTEP) grant.
